## Checklist

- [ ] I am a registered contributor in `registry/contributors.json` *(not registered yet? [Open a contributor registration issue](https://github.com/Aina-Design-Corp/mokulearner-research/issues/new?template=new-contributor.yml) first)*
- [ ] My data file is in CSV or GeoJSON format
- [ ] I have included a `metadata.json` following the [schema](schemas/metadata.schema.json)
- [ ] All required fields in my data are present and non-null
- [ ] I have declared an open data license
- [ ] If my data lacks coordinate columns, I have included a `coverage` description or `moku_ids`
- [ ] I have included a citation (if applicable)
